title: Auditar Segurança de Frontend
overall_posture: ACCEPTABLE for audited frontend patterns, pending network-enabled dependency advisory verification

checks.title: Tokens stored in browser storage
checks.evidence: Browser storage usage is limited to non-sensitive UI state. AppShell persists only the sidebar expansion flag in localStorage, and ProjectLayout persists only the selected roadmap id in sessionStorage. No JWT/auth token storage, document.cookie access, or Authorization header injection code was found in frontend/src.

checks.title: Unsanitized HTML rendering
checks.evidence: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, innerHTML, v-html, or equivalent raw DOM HTML sinks were found in frontend/src. Dynamic rich content is rendered through ReactMarkdown in ChatPage and ArtifactDetailDrawer, and no rehypeRaw or comparable plugin was found that would render raw HTML from markdown input.

checks.title: Vulnerable JavaScript dependencies
checks.evidence: The frontend uses a committed package-lock.json and no third-party CDN scripts were found in index.html. However, npm audit could not complete because the npm advisories bulk endpoint was unreachable from this environment, so current high/critical dependency advisories could not be verified during this run.

checks.title: Critical business logic in frontend
checks.evidence: Client-side logic is limited to presentation and operator UX concerns such as token usage summaries and button enabling. Task eligibility, run limits, and review transitions are driven by backend-provided state fields and server API calls rather than client-only enforcement. No pricing, coupon, purchase, or quota business logic unique to the frontend was found.

checks: Static search across frontend/src for localStorage/sessionStorage/token/auth/cookie patterns
Static search across frontend/src for dangerouslySetInnerHTML/innerHTML and equivalent sinks
Manual inspection of ReactMarkdown rendering paths in ChatPage and ArtifactDetailDrawer
Manual inspection of run/task execution flows and backend API coupling
npm audit --json attempted in frontend but advisories endpoint was unreachable
limitations: Live dependency advisory status could not be confirmed because npm audit could not reach registry.npmjs.org from this environment.
vite build could not be executed end-to-end in this sandbox because esbuild process spawn failed with EPERM.
